title: Spawned Eggs
description: Replaces spawn egg textures with blocky mob icons.
body:
![A selection of the blocky mob icon spawn egg textures in this resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02df0baff3a7e910b1e292e2e36dd6bd49d59859.png)

Replaces the default spawn eggs with full-body pixel icons of the mobs they summon.

No more inscrutable recolors or vaguely egg-shaped blobs with unsettling features—each egg is now like a little action figure of its mob, staying true to Minecraft’s blocky style.

This is an adaptation of the spawn egg textures in my resource pack, [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape), with changes for a better fit with the Default resource pack and mob designs.

[**Bedrock version on CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/spawned-eggs-bedrock)
